title: Claude + NotebookLM: Ultimate AI Automation Workflow to Work 10x Faster
summary: A no-code AI workflow combining Claude with NotebookLM for automated content creation. Three workflows are presented: converting topics and sources into multiple content formats (YouTube script, podcast, slides, infographic); using Claude to engineer prompts for generating 4K infographics from PDFs; and automating NotebookLM tasks via Claude Cowork and browser extensions.
writeup: The video demonstrates a no-code workflow that pairs Claude with NotebookLM for automated content creation. It walks through three workflows: converting topics and sources into multiple output formats (YouTube script, podcast, slides, infographic); using Claude to engineer prompts that generate 4K infographics from PDFs; and automating NotebookLM tasks through Claude Cowork and browser extensions. The throughline is prompt engineering applied to workflow automation, showing how the two tools hand off content to each other across formats.
